mode_descriptions.auto: Try eBPF first, fall back to sniff (recommended)
mode_descriptions.sniff: Use Scapy sniff() with libpcap - can run alongside other receivers
mode_descriptions.socket: Use UDP socket binding - requires exclusive port access

fragment_reassembly._comment: IP fragment reassembly for SNMP traps exceeding MTU (~1472 bytes). Applies to both sniff and eBPF capture modes.
